name: analyze_code
description: Analyze code for basic metrics
code:
def execute(params):
    """Analyze code for basic metrics."""
    code = params.get('code')
    if not code:
        return {'success': False, 'error': 'code parameter is required'}

    language = params.get('language', 'unknown')
    lines = code.split('\n')
    non_empty_lines = [l for l in lines if l.strip()]

    # Detect comment patterns based on language
    comment_patterns = ['#', '//', '/*', '*', '<!--']
    comment_lines = [l for l in lines if any(l.strip().startswith(p) for p in comment_patterns)]

    return {
        'success': True,
        'language': language,
        'total_lines': len(lines),
        'code_lines': len(non_empty_lines),
        'comment_lines': len(comment_lines),
        'blank_lines': len(lines) - len(non_empty_lines),
        'avg_line_length': sum(len(l) for l in lines) / len(lines) if lines else 0
    }

name: playwright_fetch
description: Fetch webpage content using Playwright browser with stealth mode (bypasses bot detection, handles JS-rendered pages)
code:
# This skill is executed via the /api/playwright/fetch endpoint
# Parameters:
#   url (string): Single URL to fetch
#   urls (array): Multiple URLs to fetch in parallel
#   timeout (number): Timeout in ms (default: 15000)
#   waitForJS (boolean): Wait for JavaScript to render (default: true)
#   includeLinks (boolean): Extract links from page (default: false)
#   maxLength (number): Max content length (default: 8000)
#
# Features:
# - Browser pooling for fast execution
# - Stealth mode with fingerprint randomization
# - Handles JavaScript-rendered content
# - Automatic bot detection avoidance
# - Falls back to axios if Playwright unavailable

name: playwright_interact
description: Interact with a webpage (click, type, scroll) before extracting content (for complex sites requiring user actions)
code:
# This skill is executed via the /api/playwright/interact endpoint
# Parameters:
#   url (string): URL to navigate to
#   actions (array): Actions to perform, each with:
#     - type: 'click', 'type', 'wait', 'scroll', 'waitForNavigation'
#     - selector: CSS selector for click/type/wait
#     - text: Text to type (for 'type' action)
#     - timeout: Max wait time (for 'wait' and 'waitForNavigation')
#   timeout (number): Overall timeout in ms (default: 30000)
#   maxLength (number): Max content length (default: 8000)
#
# Example actions:
#   [{"type": "click", "selector": "button.accept-cookies"}]
#   [{"type": "type", "selector": "input#search", "text": "query"}]
#   [{"type": "scroll"}]
#   [{"type": "waitForNavigation"}]

name: web_search
description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo with optional Playwright content fetching (returns actual page content, not just snippets)
code:
# This skill is executed via the /api/search endpoint
# Parameters:
#   query (string): Search query
#   limit (number): Max number of results (default: 5)
#   fetchContent (boolean): Fetch actual page content (default: false)
#   contentLimit (number): Number of URLs to fetch content from (default: 3)
#   timeRange (string): d/w/m/y for day/week/month/year filter
#
# Features:
# - Auto-enhances 'recent/latest/news' queries with current date
# - Uses Playwright for content fetching when available
# - Falls back to axios for basic content extraction
# - Caches results for 1 hour
# - Returns extracted content including title, summary, headings, and paragraphs
